title: memento
summary: Link relation type "memento": The Target IRI points to a Memento, a fixed resource that will not change state anymore. Defined in RFC7089.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: The Target IRI points to a Memento, a fixed resource that will not change state anymore.
raw_columns.Notes:
A Memento for an Original Resource is a resource that
      encapsulates a prior state of the Original Resource.
